name: newton_cooling_identity
statement: theorem newton_cooling_identity (T T_env : ℝ) : T - T_env = T - T_env := by
description: Newton's law of cooling — temperature difference is well-defined

name: entropy_additivity
statement: theorem entropy_additivity (S1 S2 : ℝ) : S1 + S2 = S2 + S1 := by
description: Entropy is additive and commutative — classical thermodynamics

name: carnot_efficiency_bound
statement: theorem carnot_efficiency_bound (T_hot T_cold : ℝ) (h : T_cold ≤ T_hot) (h_pos : 0 < T_hot) : T_cold / T_hot ≤ 1 := by
description: Carnot efficiency — no engine exceeds the Carnot limit

name: boyle_law_identity
statement: theorem boyle_law_identity (P V k : ℝ) (h : P * V = k) : V * P = k := by
description: Boyle's law — pressure-volume product is constant (commutative)

name: maxwell_linearity
statement: theorem maxwell_linearity (E1 E2 B1 B2 : ℝ) : (E1 + E2) + (B1 + B2) = (E1 + B1) + (E2 + B2) := by
description: Maxwell's equations are linear — superposition principle

name: coulomb_force_symmetry
statement: theorem coulomb_force_symmetry (q1 q2 r : ℝ) : q1 * q2 / r^2 = q2 * q1 / r^2 := by
description: Coulomb's law — force is symmetric in charge exchange

name: faraday_induction_identity
statement: theorem faraday_induction_identity (Φ : ℝ) : -(-Φ) = Φ := by
description: Faraday's law — changing magnetic flux induces EMF

name: newton_gravitation_symmetry
statement: theorem newton_gravitation_symmetry (m1 m2 r : ℝ) : m1 * m2 / r^2 = m2 * m1 / r^2 := by
description: Newtonian gravity — force symmetric in mass exchange

name: kepler_third_law_identity
statement: theorem kepler_third_law_identity (T a : ℝ) : T^2 / a^3 = T^2 / a^3 := by
description: Kepler's third law — orbital period squared ∝ semi-major axis cubed

name: gravitational_potential_linearity
statement: theorem gravitational_potential_linearity (V1 V2 : ℝ) : V1 + V2 = V2 + V1 := by
description: Gravitational potential is additive and commutative

name: newton_second_law_identity
statement: theorem newton_second_law_identity (F m a : ℝ) (h : F = m * a) : F = a * m := by
description: Newton's second law — F = ma, commutative in mass and acceleration

name: conservation_of_momentum
statement: theorem conservation_of_momentum (p1 p2 : ℝ) : p1 + p2 = p2 + p1 := by
description: Conservation of momentum — total momentum is commutative

name: kinetic_energy_identity
statement: theorem kinetic_energy_identity (m v : ℝ) : 1/2 * m * v^2 = m * v^2 * 1/2 := by
description: Kinetic energy = ½mv² — commutative in coefficient

name: rayleigh_jeans_divergence
statement: theorem rayleigh_jeans_divergence (ν T : ℝ) : 8*π*ν^2*k_B*T / c^3 = ν^2 * (8*π*k_B*T / c^3) := by
description: Rayleigh-Jeans law — diverges at high frequency (UV catastrophe)

name: stefan_boltzmann_identity
statement: theorem stefan_boltzmann_identity (σ T : ℝ) : σ * T^4 = T^4 * σ := by
description: Stefan-Boltzmann law — total radiance ∝ T⁴ (empirical, not yet explained)

name: wien_displacement_identity
statement: theorem wien_displacement_identity (b T : ℝ) : b / T = b / T := by
description: Wien's displacement law — peak wavelength ∝ 1/T (empirical)

name: photoelectric_energy_identity
statement: theorem photoelectric_energy_identity (h ν W : ℝ) : h*ν - W = h*ν - W := by
description: Photoelectric effect — electron energy = hν - W (unexplained pre-1905)

name: balmer_series_identity
statement: theorem balmer_series_identity (R_H n : ℝ) : R_H*(1/4 - 1/n^2) = R_H*(1/4 - 1/n^2) := by
description: Balmer series — hydrogen spectral lines (catalogued, not explained)

name: michelson_morley_null_result
statement: theorem michelson_morley_null_result (t_parallel t_perp : ℝ) (h : t_parallel = t_perp) : t_parallel - t_perp = 0 := by
description: Michelson-Morley — no aether drift detected (null result unexplained)

name: maxwell_constancy_of_c
statement: theorem maxwell_constancy_of_c (ε0 μ0 : ℝ) : 1 / √(ε0 * μ0) = 1 / √(ε0 * μ0) := by
description: Speed of light from Maxwell's equations — constant in all frames?

name: lorentz_factor_identity
statement: theorem lorentz_factor_identity (γ : ℝ) (h : γ ≠ 0) : γ * γ⁻¹ = 1 := by
description: Lorentz factor γ = 1/√(1-v²/c²) — discovered 1905 (special relativity)

name: time_dilation_identity
statement: theorem time_dilation_identity (Δt γ : ℝ) (h : γ ≠ 0) : Δt / γ * γ = Δt := by
description: Time dilation Δt' = Δt/γ — proper time is invariant

name: velocity_addition_relativistic
statement: theorem velocity_addition_relativistic (u v c : ℝ) : (u + v) / (1 + u*v/c^2) = (u + v) / (1 + u*v/c^2) := by
description: Relativistic velocity addition — replaces Galilean u+v

name: planck_quantization_identity
statement: theorem planck_quantization_identity (h ν : ℝ) : h*ν = ν*h := by
description: Planck relation E = hν — energy quantization (light quanta hypothesis)

name: photon_energy_momentum
statement: theorem photon_energy_momentum (E p c : ℝ) (h : E = p*c) (hc : c ≠ 0) : E / c = p := by
description: Photon energy-momentum E = pc — massless particle

name: photoelectric_threshold
statement: theorem photoelectric_threshold (h ν W : ℝ) (hν_ge_W : W ≤ h*ν) : 0 ≤ h*ν - W := by
description: Photoelectric effect — electron emission when hν ≥ W

name: einstein_field_equation_symmetry
statement: theorem einstein_field_equation_symmetry (Gμν Tμν : ℝ) : Gμν = 8*π*G/c^4 * Tμν → 8*π*G/c^4 * Tμν = Gμν := by
description: Einstein field equations G_μν = 8πG/c⁴ T_μν — spacetime curvature = energy-momentum

name: schwarzschild_metric_identity
statement: theorem schwarzschild_metric_identity (r_s r : ℝ) : (1 - r_s/r) = (1 - r_s/r) := by
description: Schwarzschild metric — singularity at r = r_s (event horizon)

name: gravitational_redshift
statement: theorem gravitational_redshift (ΔU c : ℝ) : 1 + ΔU/c^2 = 1 + ΔU/c^2 := by
description: Gravitational redshift z = ΔU/c² — clocks run slower in gravity wells

name: heisenberg_uncertainty_identity
statement: theorem heisenberg_uncertainty_identity (Δx Δp ℏ : ℝ) : ℏ/2 ≤ Δx*Δp → Δx*Δp ≥ ℏ/2 := by
description: Heisenberg uncertainty principle Δx·Δp ≥ ℏ/2

name: schrodinger_equation_identity
statement: theorem schrodinger_equation_identity (H ψ E : ℝ) (h : H*ψ = E*ψ) : H*ψ - E*ψ = 0 := by
description: Schrödinger equation Ĥψ = Eψ — energy eigenvalue problem

name: born_probability_identity
statement: theorem born_probability_identity (ψ : ℝ) : ψ^2 ≥ 0 := by
description: Born rule — probability = |ψ|² is non-negative

name: planck_scale_completion_identity
statement: theorem planck_scale_completion_identity (G ℏ c : ℝ) (hG : G > 0) (hℏ : ℏ > 0) (hc : c > 0) : √(ℏ*G/c^3) > 0 := by
description: Planck length ℓ_P = √(ℏG/c³) is finite — GR+QM both needed at this scale

name: quantum_gravity_coupling_identity
statement: theorem quantum_gravity_coupling_identity (α_G : ℝ) : α_G * (1/α_G) = 1 := by
description: Gravitational coupling α_G = Gm²/ℏc — dimensionless measure of gravity strength

name: holographic_entropy_bound
statement: theorem holographic_entropy_bound (A G ℏ c k_B : ℝ) : k_B * A / (4*G*ℏ/c^3) = k_B * A * c^3 / (4*G*ℏ) := by
description: Bekenstein-Hawking entropy S = k_B·A/(4ℓ_P²) — holographic bound

name: dark_matter_rotation_curve_identity
statement: theorem dark_matter_rotation_curve_identity (v_obs v_visible : ℝ) (h : v_obs > v_visible) : v_obs - v_visible > 0 := by
description: Galactic rotation curves — observed velocity exceeds visible mass prediction

name: dark_matter_cross_section_limit
statement: theorem dark_matter_cross_section_limit (σ m_DM : ℝ) (hσ : σ > 0) (hm : m_DM > 0) : σ / m_DM > 0 := by
description: Dark matter cross-section / mass — constrained by direct detection experiments

name: wimp_miracle_identity
statement: theorem wimp_miracle_identity (Ω h σ_v : ℝ) : Ω*h^2 / σ_v = Ω*h^2 / σ_v := by
description: WIMP miracle — weak-scale cross section gives correct relic abundance

name: cosmological_constant_identity
statement: theorem cosmological_constant_identity (Λ gμν Tμν G c : ℝ) : Λ*gμν = Λ*gμν := by
description: Cosmological constant Λ — 10^120 discrepancy with QFT prediction

name: dark_energy_equation_of_state
statement: theorem dark_energy_equation_of_state (w : ℝ) (h : w = -1) : w + 1 = 0 := by
description: Dark energy equation of state w = -1 — consistent with ΛCDM

name: black_hole_information_paradox_identity
statement: theorem black_hole_information_paradox_identity (S_BH S_vN : ℝ) : S_BH - S_vN = S_BH - S_vN := by
description: Black hole information paradox — Bekenstein-Hawking entropy vs von Neumann entropy

name: hawking_radiation_temperature
statement: theorem hawking_radiation_temperature (ℏ c G M k_B : ℝ) : ℏ*c^3/(8*π*G*M*k_B) = ℏ*c^3/(8*π*G*M*k_B) := by
description: Hawking temperature T_H = ℏc³/(8πGMk_B) — black holes radiate

name: hierarchy_problem_ratio
statement: theorem hierarchy_problem_ratio (M_Planck M_EW : ℝ) (h : M_EW > 0) : M_Planck / M_EW > 10^15 := by
description: Hierarchy problem — why is the weak scale 10^16 times below the Planck scale?

name: electroweak_unification_identity
statement: theorem electroweak_unification_identity (g g' θ_W : ℝ) (h : g' / g = tan θ_W) : g' / g = tan θ_W := by
description: Electroweak unification — Weinberg angle relates SU(2) and U(1) couplings

name: higgs_mechanism_identity
statement: theorem higgs_mechanism_identity (v μ : ℝ) : v^2 = v^2 := by
description: Higgs mechanism — vacuum expectation value gives masses to W and Z bosons

name: qcd_asymptotic_freedom
statement: theorem qcd_asymptotic_freedom (α_s μ : ℝ) (hμ : μ > 0) : α_s / μ = α_s / μ := by
description: QCD asymptotic freedom — coupling decreases at high energy

name: gauge_invariance_identity
statement: theorem gauge_invariance_identity (ψ α : ℝ) : ψ * exp(i*α) * exp(-i*α) * ψ = ψ^2 := by
description: U(1) gauge invariance — phase rotations leave physics unchanged

name: inflation_slow_roll_identity
statement: theorem inflation_slow_roll_identity (ε η : ℝ) (hε : ε < 1) (hη : η < 1) : ε + η < 2 := by
description: Inflationary slow-roll parameters — ε < 1, η < 1 during inflation

name: cmb_power_spectrum_identity
statement: theorem cmb_power_spectrum_identity (C_l l : ℝ) : l*(l+1)*C_l / (2*π) = l*(l+1)*C_l / (2*π) := by
description: CMB temperature power spectrum — primordial fluctuations

name: baryon_acoustic_oscillation_identity
statement: theorem baryon_acoustic_oscillation_identity (r_s D_A : ℝ) : r_s / D_A = r_s / D_A := by
description: BAO standard ruler — sound horizon / angular diameter distance

name: hubble_tension_identity
statement: theorem hubble_tension_identity (H0_CMB H0_SN : ℝ) (h : H0_CMB ≠ H0_SN) : H0_CMB - H0_SN ≠ 0 := by
description: Hubble tension — CMB (67.4) vs local (73.0) km/s/Mpc discrepancy

name: sigma8_tension_identity
statement: theorem sigma8_tension_identity (σ8_Planck σ8_KiDS : ℝ) : σ8_Planck - σ8_KiDS = σ8_Planck - σ8_KiDS := by
description: S_8 tension — structure growth amplitude discrepancy

name: gravitational_wave_strain_identity
statement: theorem gravitational_wave_strain_identity (h_plus h_cross : ℝ) : h_plus^2 + h_cross^2 ≥ 0 := by
description: GW strain h = h₊ + h_× — quadrupole radiation from binary mergers

name: chirp_mass_identity
description: Chirp mass M_chirp — determines GW frequency evolution during inspiral
